# Contributing to WebifyCMS Installer

We welcome contributions! Since the installer is part of the WebifyCMS ecosystem,
please follow the same guidelines as the main project.

See the [main contributing guidelines](https://github.com/webifycms/app/blob/main/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) 
for details on:

- Reporting bugs
- Suggesting features
- Submitting pull requests
- Code style and standards
- License compliance

All contributions are expected to adhere to the project's [code of conduct](https://github.com/webifycms/app/blob/main/.github/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) (if applicable)
and the [WebifyCMS license](LICENSE.md).
